summary: Generated exactly one runnable local helper wrapper script artifact that reuses the reviewed delegate path contract, preserves parameter-driven input/output behavior, enforces structured delegate evidence gates, prefers sidecar report handoff via --report-json, keeps dry-run/zero-PDF outcomes reviewable as partial, and bounds delegate execution with an explicit timeout.
notes: The artifact is a deterministic local wrapper intended to delegate only to the reviewed repository script artifacts/scripts/pdf_to_excel_ocr.py when available.
The wrapper resolves relative delegate paths from repository/script location rather than Path.cwd().
The wrapper preserves meaningful traceability fields from the incoming request and emits a structured JSON summary.
